preferred_translation: having recognized earth as earth, one takes oneself to be earth
alternative_translations: having recognized earth as earth, one conceives earth
discouraged_translations: having perceived earth, one thinks about earth
definition: MN 1 formula surface showing the move from recognition into self-taking.
notes: Use this record as the governing ordinary-person control line for the MN 1 maññati pattern. The English deliberately expands the selfing force rather than leaving maññati as a thinner abstract conceiving-verb. The line is not about neutral cognition; it marks the shift from recognition into appropriation.

example_phrases.translation: having recognized earth as earth, one takes oneself to be earth
example_phrases.notes: Control line for the ordinary-person side of the MN 1 pattern.

authority_basis.scope: Supports the ordinary-person move from recognition into selfing in the root-sequence pattern.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use this as the standard English control line for the ordinary-person MN 1 selfing pattern.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not flatten the line into generic perception or thought language, and do not use the conceives alternate unless a source-critical discussion explicitly requires it.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the MN 1 pattern from losing the move from recognition into self-taking.
